Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Here is the updated declare model with new constraints aimed at reducing bias in the loan application process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Added coexistence between decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo and ManualReview This ensures that any decision involving sensitive applicant attributes must be reviewed manually reducing the risk of biased outcomes based on demographic information

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: CheckApplicantRace must be followed by BiasMitigationCheck not directly by FinalDecision or Reject

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Succession Constraints BiasMitigationCheck must precede any FinalDecision ensuring that a fairness check occurs before finalizing the outcome

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject or Approve ensuring that a decision is not made immediately after checking sensitive attributes without a fairness check

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Prevent long chains from CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision or Reject ensuring that even if multiple steps occur a fairness check intervenes before a biased decision is made

Name: Validation - NE
Text: These constraints collectively enforce that sensitive attributes influence decisions only after appropriate fairness checks promoting equitable treatment of all applicants regardless of demographic characteristics
